name: Seitan and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Prep time: 15 to 25 minutes
2. Slice onions and set aside.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
4. Add the Seitan pieces and cook until browned, turning occasionally.
5. Remove the Seitan from the pan and set aside.
6. In the same pan, add the onions and sauté for 2-3 minutes until they begin to soften.
7. Stir in the tamari soy sauce and vegetable stock or water.
8. Return the Seitan to the pan and stir to combine all ingredients.
9. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the liquid is reduced to almost nothing, about 10-15 minutes.
10. Serve hot with a grain or bread of your choice.
